---
title: "Brain Data Analysis"
author: "Katy Brown"
format: html
---

In this document I will compare the total number of genes with regionally elevated expression in different regions of the forebrain for human, pig and mouse. 

Human

```{r}
total_elevated_human <- sum(180, 83, 57, 110)
print (total_elevated_human)
```

Mouse

```{r}
total_elevated_mouse <- sum(55, 185, 60, 98)
print (total_elevated_mouse)
```

Pig
```{r}
total_elevated_pig <- sum(109, 157, 31, 45)
print (total_elevated_pig)
```

The highest number of genes with elevated expression was 430, in humans.
